exampleEn: Some types of minerals are made when magma cools and solidifies.
exampleCn: 有些类型的矿物是在岩浆冷却凝固的过程中形成的。
remember: 字根 mag 意为“揉，捏”，另外在希腊语中 magma 意为“浓厚的软膏”，后引申为岩浆，因其流动起来柔软如膏。

exampleEn: His theory violates current thermodynamic laws.
exampleCn: 他的理论违反了当前的热力学定律。
remember: thermo (热) + dynamic (力的；力学) -> 热力的；热力学的。

exampleEn: The smog was so bad that schoolchildren were advised to stay indoors.
exampleCn: 雾霾太严重，建议小学生们留在室内。
remember: 英文中的混合构词法：smoke + fog -> smog (烟雾)；motor + hotel -> motel (汽车旅馆)；helicopter + airport -> heliport (直升机机场)；breakfast + lunch -> brunch (早午餐)。

meaning: n. [-s] (难闻且常为有害的) 烟，气体 v. 冒烟；发怒
exampleEn: Petrol fumes from cars are poisoning the atmosphere.
exampleCn: 汽车排放的汽油烟气正在污染大气。

meaning: n. 薄雾；水汽；使视线模糊的东西
exampleEn: She could hardly recognise her son through a mist of tears.
exampleCn: 她泪眼模糊，几乎不能认出自己的儿子。

collocations.collocation: lost in the mists of time

remember: 通过语境及薄雾的视觉感记忆。

exampleEn: A terrible tsunami followed the earthquake.
exampleCn: 一场骇人的海啸跟随地震而来。
remember: 日语音译，来自“港口（tsu）”+“波浪（nami）”。

exampleEn: Many areas in Africa have suffered severe drought this year.
exampleCn: 今年，非洲的很多地区遭受了严重的干旱。
remember: 词源同 dry (adj. 干的，干燥的)。

exampleEn: Since the flooding began last month, 16 people have died statewide.
exampleCn: 自上个月洪水爆发以来，全州已有 16 人死亡。

notes.meaning: v. 淹没；充满 n. 洪水

exampleEn: A torrent of water poured down the mountain.
remember: 联想记忆，形容水流势不可挡。

exampleEn: Several countries in eastern Europe are counting the losses caused by yesterday's earthquake.
exampleCn: 东欧的几个国家正在统计昨天地震造成的人员伤亡。
remember: earth (地球) + quake (震动) -> 地震。
